description: You are an Environmental Compliance Officer auditing industrial facilities under the EPA Cap-and-Trade program using the EPA_AUDIT schema (epa_audit/Audit2024, Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1). Your goal is to identify non-compliant facilities and calculate penalties based on 2023 telemetry and trading data. Process the HOURLY_CEMS data into a view named CEMS_IMPUTED_VW, substituting NULL co2_mass_tons values with the most recent prior non-null reading for that facility (ordered chronologically by op_date and op_hour). This view should contain facility_id, op_date, op_hour, original_co2, and imputed_co2. Use this to create a view ANNUAL_EMISSIONS_VW showing total_emissions_tons per facility_id for the year. Calculate final_allowances for each account in ALLOWANCE_ACCOUNTS in a view named NET_ALLOWANCES_VW using the formula: initial_allocation + (Total Purchased) - (Total Sold), treating missing purchase or sale sums as 0. Generate a table named COMPLIANCE_PENALTIES for facilities where total_emissions_tons is greater than final_allowances. Include facility_id, facility_name, total_emissions_tons, final_allowances, shortfall_tons, and a penalty_amount calculated at the $214.00 statutory rate per shortfall ton. Export the resulting table to /home/ga/Documents/exports/epa_penalties.csv.
